'''Laurent Bouzereau''' is a film historian and documentarian. He is the author of ''[[Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays]]'' and co-author of [[Star Wars: The Making of Episode I The Phantom Menace|''The Making of Episode I: The Phantom Menace'']]. In addition to his documentary for [[George Lucas]]' [[Wikipedia:American Graffiti|''American Graffiti'']], Bouzereau has made documentaries for many of [[Steven Spielberg]]'s films, including [[Wikipedia:E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial|''E.T. the Extra-Terrestrial'']], [[Wikipedia:The Terminal|''The Terminal'']], [[Wikipedia:Jaws (film)|''Jaws'']], [[Wikipedia:Minority Report (film)|''Minority Report'']], and many others.

Bozereau directed the documentary ''[[Secrets of The Force Awakens: A Cinematic Journey]]'' for the [[Star Wars home video releases|home video release]] of [[Star Wars: Episode VII The Force Awakens|''Star Wars'': Episode VII ''The Force Awakens'']].<ref name="Episode VII home">{{Film|VII}}</ref> He also directed the [[Disney+]] special ''[[Ahsoka: Sabine's Loth-Cat]]''.<ref name="Disney+">{{DisneyPlus|url=movies/ahsoka-sabines-loth-cat/7WrueeJH7mqL|text=Ahsoka: Sabine's Loth-Cat}}</ref>
